name: TJ Johnson
title: Senior Technical Producer
tagline: Technical production and delivery of complex interactive systems — games, mobile, live operations, and immersive experiences.
summary: Senior Technical Producer and technical production leader with 20+ years delivering large-scale interactive systems across games, mobile, live operations, and immersive experiences at The Walt Disney Company. Leads cross-functional teams across engineering, creative, product, and operations to execute complex initiatives from concept through launch.
coreStatement: Strongest in high-ambiguity environments where technical execution and player experience both matter.
